title: Steamy American Tuna Stir-fry
description: A sweet and light keto-friendly dish featuring tuna steamed with a touch of sweetness for a romantic twist.
instructions: Season the tuna fillets with salt and pepper.
Heat olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add onions, red peppers, and lemon zest; sauté for about 2 minutes.
Place seasoned tuna on top of the vegetables. Pour over 1/4 cup of water and cover tightly with aluminum foil.
Bake in preheated oven for 8-10 minutes or until the fish is cooked through.
Remove from heat, add broccoli florets and cook for another 2-3 minutes to wilt slightly.
Squeeze fresh lemon juice over the top before serving.
